rulings.Case Title: DIANE SCHOBER et al VS. KAMRAN ARDEBILCHI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion For Protective Order And Request For Monetary Sanctions As To Defendant Kamram Ardebilchi And Defendants Counsel Probal Young And Audrey Tearnan Of Archer Norris, Plc

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 19, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained as to the 8th cause of action for negligence with leave to amend to allege facts re: duty and breach of duty. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 19, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT RSM&A FORECLOSURE SERVICES, LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. Motion is DENIED as to the request for attorneys fees. Motion is otherwise granted in light of dismissal and ruling on the demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 19, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT RSM&A FORECLOSURE SERVICES, LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer to the 1st cause of action for quiet title is sustained without leave to amend; no adverse interest alleged. Demurrer to the 8th cause of action for negligence is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts re: duty and breach of duty. Demurrer to the 9th cause of action for declaratory relief is overruled. Demurrer to the 6th cause of action for breach of fiduciary duty is moot (dismissal on file). Demurrer to the 3rd cause of action for breach of contract (Demurrer 3:12-14) is moot as no such cause of action is alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 19, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Request for punitive damages is stricken with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege facts re: malice, oppression or fraud by the moving defendant. Motion is denied as to the request for attorneys fees as this request is not directed at the moving defendant. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED VS. MARK A CROMWELL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 19, 2015, line 10. DEFENDANT MARK CROMWELL's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint DENIED. Notice of Intent includes sufficient information re: "rent applicable to each residential unit;" Plaintiff complied with Govt. Code 7060.4(b)(5); advice regarding re-rental rights was sufficient. = (501/REQ)
